channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The iPhone 17 Air could have echoes of the original MacBook Air, if the latest rumors are true
item.description: The iPhone 17 Air will have its fair share of drawbacks, but it could be the start of a new era for Apple.
item.dc:creator: alexblake.techradar@gmail.com (Alex Blake), TechRadar

item.title: For Black Friday deals, these 3 sites are all you need
item.description: I’m in my mid-forties. Things are going gray in places and my hips hurt for no reason. And back in my day, Black Friday was one day: the Friday after Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Windows Recall: All your privacy questions answered
item.description: Windows Recall is an AI-based feature that will be built into new Copilot+ PCs. Recall takes snapshots of your screen every few seconds and uses that data to make a searchable index of everything you’ve ever done on your PC.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australian father of teen sextortion victim backs banning young children from social media
item.description: Wayne Holdsworth became an advocate for banning Australian children younger than 16 from social media because his son took his own life after falling victim to an online sextortion scam.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pentagon drafts large-scale government AI contract
item.description: Potential bidders have a little under a month to offer feedback on the draft RFP for what DoD is calling the Advancing AI Multiple Award Contract. The post Pentagon drafts large-scale government AI contract first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: AI-Powered Data Analysis Tools: A Review of 5 Platforms
item.description: Discover five AI-powered data analysis tools that can help you make sense of complex datasets and extract valuable insights.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Lost access? Here’s how to reclaim your Facebook account
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to regain your Facebook access if you get hacked or locked out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: North Korean hackers use disguised apps to target Macs with hidden malware
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says North Korean hackers hide malware in macOS apps, bypassing Mac security checks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GitHub Copilot: Everything you need to know
item.description: In 2014, Microsoft Research released an experimental Bing Code Search add-on for Visual Studio and the web. It was a code snippet search tool for C# with a natural language interface, using an index of code from Stack Overflow, MSDN, Dotnetperls, and CSharp411, powered by Bing, running on Azure.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Don’t get caught in the 'Apple ID suspended' phishing scam
item.description: Even the most tech-savvy computer users have to think twice with some of the clever phishing emails scammers are coming up with these days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cheap Black Friday deals cost to your privacy
item.description: As Black Friday approaches, you should know that retailers often sell consumers' personal information and purchase histories to third parties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Windows 11 will soon be available on Meta Quest 3 headsets
item.description: Meta Quest 3 and Quest 3S headset owners will soon gain access to the “full capabilities” of Windows 11 in mixed reality, Microsoft announced at its Ignite conference this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Angular 19 bolsters server-side rendering with incremental hydration
item.description: Angular 19, the latest version of Google’s TypeScript-based web development framework, has arrived. The update introduces incremental hydration and a route-level render mode, both in developer preview, and enables event replay by default. The release was officially unveiled on November 19.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia is Wall Street's most valuable company. How it got there, by the numbers
item.description: Nvidia has once again turned out quarterly results that exceeded Wall Street's forecasts. The company has seen soaring demand for its semiconductors, which are used to power artificial intelligence applications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4
